entities.name: COVID-19
entities.description: A pandemic that undermines food security and disturbs food systems

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex network of activities involved in the production, processing, distribution, and consumption of food

entities.name: LOCKDOWNS
entities.description: Government-imposed restrictions on movement to control the spread of COVID-19

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOMES
entities.description: The total amount of money earned by a household

entities.name: PHYSICAL ACCESS TO FOOD
entities.description: The ability of individuals or households to physically reach food sources

entities.name: DEVELOPING NATIONS
entities.description: Countries with less developed industrial bases and lower Human Development Index

entities.name: TELEPHONIC SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method using phone calls and questionnaires

entities.name: QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A research instrument consisting of a series of questions for the purpose of gathering information

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A state in India where the survey was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Telangana is located

entities.name: URBAN AREAS
entities.description: City-based locations involved in the survey

entities.name: PERI-URBAN AREAS
entities.description: Areas surrounding cities involved in the survey

entities.name: RURAL AREAS
entities.description: Countryside locations involved in the survey

entities.name: TRIBAL AREAS
entities.description: Indigenous community locations involved in the survey

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming

entities.name: POST-HARVEST LOSSES
entities.description: Loss of crop quantity or quality between harvest and consumption

entities.name: MARKETS
entities.description: Places where goods are bought and sold

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Small-seeded grasses grown as cereal crops

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops cultivated for their edible grains

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Herbaceous plants cultivated for food

entities.name: TRANSPORT
entities.description: The movement of goods from one location to another

entities.name: LABOUR
entities.description: Human effort used in the production of goods

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Edible seeds of legumes

entities.name: PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM
entities.description: A government-sponsored system for distributing food grains

entities.name: FRESH FRUITS
entities.description: Freshly harvested edible fruits

entities.name: SPICES
entities.description: Aromatic substances used for seasoning food

entities.name: NUTRITIOUS MEALS
entities.description: Meals providing essential nutrients for health
